excerpt:
For Fall 2026, our CS Master's program accepts applications from September 1, 2025, until the application deadline of January 23, 2026.
For Fall 2026, our CS Master's program accepts applications from September 1, 2025, until the application deadline of January 23, 2026. Please note that Spring entry is only available for Brown undergraduates who are doing a fifth-year Master's degree. Once the application system has closed, it won't reopen until the following September for new applications. You'll be notified by the School of Professional Studies if you're admitted.
